# Dogfood demo proof loop: plan → snapshot → apply.
# The repair apply may only touch low-risk metadata/index/archive status operations;
# manual-review issues must remain in the note files.

prepare-demo-vault vault
capture-demo-baseline vault baseline

exec sh -c 'pinax repair plan --save --vault vault --json > repair_plan.json'
validate-json-envelope repair_plan.json
validate-clean-stdout repair_plan.json
grep '"command":"repair.plan"' repair_plan.json
grep '"plan_id"' repair_plan.json
grep '"saved_path"' repair_plan.json
exists vault/.pinax/repair-plans
assert-demo-plan repair_plan.json

exec sh -c 'pinax version snapshot --vault vault --message "dogfood demo pre-apply" --json > snapshot.json'
validate-json-envelope snapshot.json
validate-clean-stdout snapshot.json
grep '"command":"version.snapshot"' snapshot.json
grep '"status":"success"' snapshot.json
exists vault/.pinax/version/snapshots
exists vault/.pinax/last_snapshot

exec sh -c 'plan=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open(\"repair_plan.json\"))[\"facts\"][\"plan_id\"])"); pinax repair apply --plan "$plan" --yes --vault vault --json > repair_apply.json'
validate-json-envelope repair_apply.json
validate-clean-stdout repair_apply.json
grep '"command":"repair.apply"' repair_apply.json
grep '"status":"success"' repair_apply.json
assert-demo-apply repair_apply.json

assert-demo-metadata-patched baseline/notes/research/meeting-2026.md vault/notes/research/meeting-2026.md
assert-demo-manual-unchanged baseline vault

exec sh -c 'pinax vault doctor --vault vault --json > doctor_after_apply.json'
validate-json-envelope doctor_after_apply.json
validate-clean-stdout doctor_after_apply.json
assert-demo-post-apply-doctor doctor_after_apply.json
